content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Wrapped _resolve_context's make_context calls in 'with' blocks (nested with-per-level) to close file resources during shell completion; no core.py changes needed since Context.__enter__/__exit__ already handle nested close via ExitStack. Let me know if your validate_nesting change touches _resolve_context so we can merge cleanly.
